title: astragalus breviscapus
intro: Astragalus breviscapus, also known as Xiang Fu, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus breviscapus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving blood circulation, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and immune-boosting properties. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, making it a popular supplement in modern herbal medicine.
